'''shazhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sqn|sqn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sqn|sqn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shazhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhihith|shæzhihith]] || [[word:shæzhihij|shæzhihij]] || [[word:shæzhihish|shæzhihish]] || [[word:shæzhihi|shæzhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhuzhuhuth|shazhuzhuhuth]] || [[word:shazhuzhuhuj|shazhuzhuhuj]] || [[word:shazhuzhuhush|shazhuzhuhush]] || [[word:shazhuzhuhu|shazhuzhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhuhuth|shazhuhuth]] || [[word:shazhuhuj|shazhuhuj]] || [[word:shazhuhush|shazhuhush]] || [[word:shazhuhu|shazhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhufhuth|shazhufhuth]] || [[word:shazhufhuj|shazhufhuj]] || [[word:shazhufhush|shazhufhush]] || [[word:shazhufhuf|shazhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhuhuthu|shazhuhuthu]] || [[word:shazhuhuju|shazhuhuju]] || [[word:shazhuhushu|shazhuhushu]] || [[word:shazhuhuku|shazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhuhuth|shazhuhuth]] || [[word:shazhuhuj|shazhuhuj]] || [[word:shazhuhush|shazhuhush]] || [[word:shazhuhu|shazhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhuhuthul|shazhuhuthul]] || [[word:shazhuhujul|shazhuhujul]] || [[word:shazhuhushul|shazhuhushul]] || [[word:shazhuhukul|shazhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhuhuthuthu|shazhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:shazhuhujuju|shazhuhujuju]] || [[word:shazhuhushushu|shazhuhushushu]] || [[word:shazhuhuku|shazhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhuhuthun|shazhuhuthun]] || [[word:shazhuhujun|shazhuhujun]] || [[word:shazhuhushun|shazhuhushun]] || [[word:shazhuhukun|shazhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhuhuthuoro|shazhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:shazhuhujuoro|shazhuhujuoro]] || [[word:shazhuhushuoro|shazhuhushuoro]] || [[word:shazhuhukuoro|shazhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
